semantic_description: array_equal scans two integer arrays a and b of equal nonnegative length n from left to right. It returns 0 immediately when it finds an index i with la[i] != lb[i], and returns 1 after the loop only when every index in 0 <= i < n has equal elements. The loop may be empty when n == 0. The function only reads both arrays and preserves their full contents.
